title: geranium ibericum subsp. ibericum
intro: Geranium ibericum subsp. ibericum, also known as the Caucasian Crane's Bill or Iberian Geranium, is a species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate pain. The health benefits of Geranium ibericum subsp. ibericum include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve circulation, and exhibit antioxidant properties. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to take advantage of its medicinal and health benefits.
